A

AnimationTest - Class in testApps
 
AnimationTest() - Constructor for class testApps.AnimationTest
 

C

clear() - Method in class os.LinuxOS
 
clear() - Method in interface os.OS
this method clears the terminal of all content
clear() - Method in class os.UsableOS
 
clearTest() - Static method in class test.MainTest
Tests if the clear command actually clears the console

G

getOS() - Method in class os.LinuxOS
 
getOS() - Method in interface os.OS
this method returns the name of the operating system (linux, windows, e.t.c.)
getOS() - Method in class os.UsableOS
 
graphics - package graphics
 

L

LinuxOS - Class in os
This class has tools directly related to the Linux Operating System
LinuxOS() - Constructor for class os.LinuxOS
Constructor for LinuxOS, takes no arguments

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class test.MainTest
the main method for MainTest
main(String[]) - Static method in class testApps.AnimationTest
 
MainTest - Class in test
This Class only exists to test what would be impractical or impossible to test with junit
Keep in mind, that just because something says it passed doesn't mean it did, look for all visual cues that it passed to confirm
MainTest() - Constructor for class test.MainTest
constructor for MainTest, Should never be called

N

newLine() - Static method in class graphics.output
writes a newline to the console

O

os - package os
 
os - Variable in class os.UsableOS
this varaible holds the operating system information/class
OS - Interface in os
This interface is built to hold all the methods that an operating system would need
OSNAME - Variable in class os.LinuxOS
The Name of the operating System ~ "LINUX"
output - Class in graphics
This interface gives several powerful tools for quickly and easily writing to the console
output() - Constructor for class graphics.output
 

T

test - package test
 
testApps - package testApps
 
Timer - Class in utils
this class contains many static methods that make it easy to make the code wait a specified amount fo time
Timer() - Constructor for class utils.Timer
 

U

UsableOS<i> - Class in os
this class is where all the operating system calls are done from, makes it easy to port to windows
UsableOS(i) - Constructor for class os.UsableOS
 
utils - package utils
 
uwrite(String) - Static method in class graphics.output
writes a string to the console by overwriting the previous line up to 60 charecters

W

waitMIL(int) - Static method in class utils.Timer
this function pauses the program for a given number of milliseconds
waitSEC(int) - Static method in class utils.Timer
this function pauses the program for a given number of seconds
write(String) - Static method in class graphics.output
writes to the console
writeln(String) - Static method in class graphics.output
writes a string to the console, followed by a newline
